headline: Can Axon Sustain EBITDA Margin Momentum Amid Cost Pressures?
summary: Axon Enterprise posts 36% EBITDA growth with margin expansion, but rising costs test sustainability as it targets steady margins in 2026.

raw.headline: Can Axon Sustain EBITDA Margin Momentum Amid Cost Pressures?
raw.summary: Axon Enterprise posts 36% EBITDA growth with margin expansion, but rising costs test sustainability as it targets steady margins in 2026.

headline: Is Axon (AXON) Quietly Shifting Its AI Defense Ambitions As Board Veteran Julie Cullivan Exits?
summary: Earlier in March 2026, Axon Enterprise announced that director Julie Anne Cullivan will not stand for re-election at the 2026 Annual Meeting, while the company continues to gain attention for strong adoption of its AI-enabled public safety products. What stands out is how Axon’s AI tools like DraftOne, Fusus and Drone as First Responder are generating very large bookings and drawing interest from both public safety and defense stakeholders amid potential increases in US defense...

headline: 2 High-Flying Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Expensive stocks often command premium valuations because the market thinks their business models are exceptional. However, the downside is that high expectations are already baked into their prices, leaving little room for error if they stumble even slightly.
